full_text:
Xiahou Heng
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xiahou Hengwas born in Pei. Friend of Cao Nu, he married a niece of Cao Cao and was made a marquis. Xiahou Heng was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
